title: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Various Research Associate Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Research Associate Jobs. Those candidates who have completed their Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
